frontend.ui_library: Radix UI + Shadcn UI + TailwindCSS + Lucide Icons

database_schema.summary: Document-based NoSQL database for managing boarding house entities
collections: rooms (Room details, pricing, status, sortOrder, initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex)
contracts (Tenant agreements, rental terms, short-term support, initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex)
invoices (Monthly billing, utility calculations, short-term invoices)
roomGroups (Room grouping with colors and sortOrder)

api_endpoints.explained: Sắp xếp lại thứ tự phòng - nhận array { roomId, sortOrder, roomGroupId? }
Tạo hóa đơn mới - hỗ trợ Long-term (utility-based) và Short-term (duration-based). DTO cho phép initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex, serviceCharges có quantity/isRecurring
Lấy danh sách hóa đơn theo hợp đồng
Ghi nhận thanh toán - tự động cập nhật paidAmount/remainingAmount/status của invoice
Chấm dứt hợp đồng - cập nhật status, giải phóng phòng, tùy chọn đóng khách thuê
Cập nhật hợp đồng - DRAFT: tự do chỉnh. ACTIVE: khóa building/room/contractType/startDate, chỉ cho chỉnh meter indexes nếu chưa có hóa đơn
Lấy calendar events với granular contract status (deposit check-in, active checkout, overdue)
Summary các events theo tháng cho hiển thị calendar dots

features: Contract Management (Create, Update with ACTIVE restrictions, Validation - Strict End Date, Termination)
Invoice Creation (Long-term with utilities, Short-term with duration pricing)
Invoice View Modal (Full breakdown: utilities, services, adjustments, payment progress)
Contract Termination (End date, final invoice option, close tenant option)
Calendar with Granular Contract Status (Deposit Check-in Due/Overdue, Active Checkout Due/Overdue)
Active Contract Update Restrictions (Immutable fields + invoice-gated meter indexes)

knowledge_items.design_system: Minimalist Pastel (Soft Gradient, Glassmorphism, Rounded UI, Soft Shadows)
patterns: Tailwind CSS Variables for Theming (Light/Dark Mode)
Hybrid DatePicker (Input + Calendar Popover) for manual entry
Consistent UI Styling: bg-card + border-border + rounded-lg for all inputs
Context-aware Dashboard Actions (e.g. Edit hidden on Occupied)
DnD-Kit Pattern: DndContext wrapper + SortableContext per group + useSortable per item
Drag Handle Pattern: GripVertical icon visible on hover for cleaner UI
Arrange Mode Toggle: Separate mode to enable drag-and-drop without accidental drags
Invoice Modal Pattern: View details in modal, actions (record payment) via callbacks
Payment Sync Pattern: PaymentsService auto-updates invoice paidAmount/status on create/delete
Calendar Event Pattern: Granular event types based on contract status (DRAFT=deposit, ACTIVE=rental) with color-coded severity
Active Contract Field Restriction: Backend strips immutable fields + checks invoice count for meter indexes; Frontend disables fields with amber hints
gotchas: Contract validation requires strict date handling: EndDate > StartDate + PaymentCycle (DueDay)
MongoDB ObjectId handling in DTOs - currentRoomId must be ObjectId, not string
Tenant currentRoomId/ownerId must be stored as ObjectId, convert in service if received as string
Input background transparency issues on white cards (Fixed with bg-input)
react-day-picker v8 flex layout causes misalignment with localized day names
Calendar today styling should use ring on button, not bg on cell
react-day-picker v9 uses different API: getDefaultClassNames(), DayButton component
@dnd-kit needs PointerSensor with distance constraint (8px) to avoid conflicts with click events
Cross-group drag needs both SortableContext (per group) and useDroppable (on group container)
InvoiceStatus enum must include CANCELLED for proper status handling
Short-term invoice uses calculateShortTermAmount() with progressive/flat price tables
Invoice API must deep populate roomId with buildingId for full display
Room uses initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex, Contract also uses initial prefix for consistency
ContractForm preSelectedRoom useEffect must also set meter indexes from room data
CreateInvoiceDto must whitelist initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex and ServiceChargeDto needs quantity/isRecurring/_id fields
ACTIVE contract update: ContractsModule must import Invoice schema to inject InvoiceModel for invoice count check
conventions: Calendar uses CSS variable --cell-size for consistent sizing
Auto-format date inputs with DD-MM-YYYY mask
Backend Security: Always validate status transitions server-side, not just UI
Hybrid Layout: RoomCard differentiates layout for Long Term vs Short Term
Drag Handle: Use GripVertical icon that appears on hover, positioned at left edge
Invoice View: Show breakdown (utilities, services, adjustments) with payment progress bar
Payment Recording: Validate amount against remaining, auto-update invoice status to PARTIAL/PAID
Meter Index Fields: Room and Contract both use initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex prefix
Calendar Colors: Purple=deposit due, Orange=checkout due, Red variants=overdue
Contract Status Colors: Blue=ACTIVE (matches dashboard OCCUPIED), Orange=DRAFT, Gray=EXPIRED, Red=TERMINATED
Active Contract Hints: Amber text-xs warnings explain why fields are disabled
